case_title: SAFIRI, EVELYN REID VS CALDERON, ERNEST

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFIRI, EVELYN REID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALDERON, ERNEST DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE- PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES, SMALL CLAIMS COURT IS NOT THE PROPER COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFIRI, EVELYN REID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, ERNEST $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, ERNEST
CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFT ON MOTION FOR RECONSI- DERATION, FILED. $10 FEE PAID. COURT ORDER NEEDED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF AUG-13-2003, GRANTED
DEFT CONTINUANCE REQUEST ON MOTION FOR RECONSIDER- ATION DENIED BY JUDGE. COPIES OF DENIAL SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAFIRI, EVELYN REID AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, ERNEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, ERNEST
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFIRI, EVELYN REID HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, FILED. $15.40 FEE PAID BUT ENTERED IN ANOTHER CASE NO. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-09-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-23-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE AT 9:00 AM. REPORT TO ROOM 103 FOR THE LOCATION OF COURT ROOM.
